mapper.select: SELECT id, site_cd, site_nm, constructor_nm, bp_cd, address, remark, is_active FROM site_master WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, site_cd, site_nm, constructor_nm, bp_cd, address, remark, is_active FROM site_master WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_master (site_cd, site_nm, constructor_nm, bp_cd, address, remark) VALUES (#{siteCd}, #{siteNm}, #{constructorNm}, #{bpCd}, #{address}, #{remark})
